series_metadata.series_description: Contracts with expert witnesses and other service venders doing business with the state.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy, then destroy. Retain existing offsite files for 75 years, unless needed for longer period of time based upon legal or administrative significance or scanned to electronic medium for storage. ; Electronic: Retain until term of contract is expired, and until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; then retain for 16 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
